nodes.name: 史瓦帝尼

nodes.name: Red-headed weaver
nodes.summary: Red-headed weaver（Red-headed weaver，学名 Anaplectes rubriceps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is placed in the monotypic genus Anaplectes and is found throughout the Afrotropics. The red-headed weaver (Anaplectes rubriceps) is a bird commonly found in eastern and southern Africa in countries such as Zambia, Zimbabwe and most of Mozambique and Botswana. They frequent savanna biomes as well as bushland and other wooded areas. At this time the species trend is stable and the population is concentrated and not fragmented into different regions

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species can be found in a wide range of areas, from Senegambia to Ethiopia and northwest Somalia, and southwards to Mozambique, northern and northeast Namibia, northern and eastern Botswana, Zimbabwe, northeast South Africa, eastern Eswatini, and northeast KwaZulu-Natal
